viral_opportunities.title: @ChopraUSA: Author: @ChopraUSA | Text: Many homeowners working to rebuild from the LA fires...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @ChopraUSA | Text: Many homeowners working to rebuild from the LA fires have been unable to access their insurance funds, since their payment gets held up by their mortgage company. California is warning mortgage companies to end improper withholding of funds for rebuilding. | URL: https://x.com/ChopraUSA/status/2077795900513247650 | Date: 2026-07-16 | Likes: 49 | Retweets: 18 | Replies: 12 | Views: 8153 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @ChopraUSA
viral_opportunities.summary: Claim that LA fire rebuild homeowners can't access insurance funds due to mortgage company holdups.
viral_opportunities.engagement_angle: Palisades rebuild-without-design-angle story capped per bias rule; monitor if it develops an insurability/reform hook.

viral_reply.body: Good to see pressure on this — cash-flow delays stall so many rebuilds. Non-combustible assemblies also help on the underwriting side once funds finally clear.

viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @10News | Text: A Vista homeowner's insurance premium jumped from $900 to $4,000 after being dropped by Farmer's Insurance and placed on California's FAIR Plan — with another rate hike of up to 50% expected in October. | URL: https://x.com/10News/status/2072840367834030175 | Date: 2026-07-03 | Likes: 58 | Retweets: 22 | Replies: 35 | Views: 12941 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @10News
viral_opportunities.summary: Vista homeowner's insurance premium quadrupled after being dropped and placed on California's FAIR Plan.
viral_opportunities.engagement_angle: Low urgency signal; track if FAIR Plan rate stories spike near wildfire season for reform-angle opportunity.

viral_reply.body: These jumps are hitting everyone. Worth noting IBHS WPH Plus and non-combustible construction can measurably improve insurability — one of the few real levers homeowners have.
